redemptionType: Existing bToken holders can redeem through Backed; new issuance is no longer available for bTokens. Product page states redemption is fully supported for existing holders.
liquidityNotes: bC3M receives a conservative monthly/low-liquidity score because Backed states bTokens are closed to new issuance and CoinGecko showed $0 24h volume with a warning that listed exchange trading had stopped. Redemption is still supported for existing holders, but secondary liquidity appears weak.
